claimText: TUM ProLehre guidance says instructors at TUM have broad discretion when deciding whether and how AI is used in teaching, and that related rules should be didactically grounded and communicated transparently to students.

citation.citationTitle: Entscheidungshilfe für den KI-Einsatz in der Lehre
